statement: The repo already has enough low-level execution primitives for V3; the main missing piece is a thin mission-specific campaign control plane with manifest and state files.
rationale: Reset, launch, status, heal, and bundle inspection already exist, but cohort-level launch/reset/status is still manual stitching.
keyAssumptions: Existing codex/lab primitives remain stable enough to be reused by the skill.
validationCriteria: A fresh agent can execute the V3 loop from manifest + existing primitives without adding new backend APIs.
critiquePoints: A helper API may still be worth adding if manual stitching proves too error-prone.
